name: Virtual Version PM
summary: Owns release-facing version records, version planning documents, and change tracking.
problem: Version information exists, but the release loop is not yet expressed as one governed planning and traceability system.
goals: Produce structured version plans and release records.
Connect requirements and runs to version decisions.
Keep release notes and rollback reasoning reviewable.
acceptanceCriteria: Every publishable version has a corresponding version plan or version record.
Release and rollback reasoning can be traced to requirements and runs.
